server.TOO_FEW_BASE_PROMO_TICKETS: {{promotionLabel}} can only be booked as a companion ticket for a ClassicCard member.

subscription.header: Welcome and have fun with your ClassicCard!

slide1.text1: One for all: the entire world of classical events in the palm of your hand!
slide1.title: Welcome to the ClassicCard app

slide3.text1: Eleven event organisers in one app. Over 1000 events per year to choose from.
slide3.title: Your access to the world of classical events!

slide4.text1: Join the ClassicCard Community and experience classical events together!
slide4.title: Connect to others!

order-no-item.current: Easily buy tickets for you and your friends.

landingpage.description: We are thrilled that you have accepted the invitation of {{createdBy}}!

renewable-to.not-valid: You can still renew your ClassicCard until {{renewableTo}}.

placeholder.description: Please send us your name and the reason why you want to change it.

voucherpurchase.description: Still looking for the perfect gift or a surprise for a special someone in your life? Pick your desired gift amount (e.g.: €28 for a ClassicCard membership) and a PDF certificate will be sent to you upon purchasing.
